default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Plan and discuss a process for identifying and reaching out to potential leads from a recent webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Utilized various data enrichment tools (AirOps, Clay, Hunter.io) to find LinkedIn profiles and company information for webinar attendees](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Developed a workflow to categorize leads into different statuses (potential client, need to set up meeting, partner, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Explored ways to streamline the lead enrichment and outreach process for future webinars](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Topics

### Data Enrichment Process

  - [Uploaded webinar registration list to AirOps and used PeopleDataLabs for initial data enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Exported errors from PeopleDataLabs into a new list to try additional enrichment with Clay agents](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Clay agents searched for LinkedIn profiles based on names, had mixed success](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Imported enriched data back into AirOps, merged columns to consolidate LinkedIn profile links](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Evaluating Lead Quality

  - [Looked at company domains, organic traffic, and keywords to gauge lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Checked if companies and roles seemed legitimate based on available data](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Identified some clear partners, potential clients, and companies to prioritize outreach](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Building a Workflow

  - [Created a new "Status" field in AirOps to categorize leads (potential client, partner, back burner, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)
  - [Aimed to consolidate quality leads into a single workflow view for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=2791.0)
  - [Discussed displaying key properties like job title on the workflow view](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clean up the lead list by removing obvious errors and invalid entries](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=3456.0)
  - [Categorize remaining leads into different statuses based on perceived quality](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=3715.0)
  - [Test outbound email capabilities within AirOps for personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=3768.0)
  - [Streamline the overall process for more efficient lead enrichment and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/rYzUKsUkkPUisDEsoixzuf39GcdjpBQY?tab=summary&timestamp=3756.0)

action_items.description: Clean up AirOps list by adding 'Status' column, filtering out irrelevant leads, and removing leads that are clearly wrong or irrelevant
Test sending outbound emails from AirOps list using a test email address to ensure it works correctly. If it does not allow sending on behalf of Marcel, notify him.
